hero.defaultSubtitle: Tradition, passion and genuine flavors in the heart of Milan
hero.badge: Since 1985 in the heart of Milan

chiSiamo.subtitle: Our Story
chiSiamo.defaultText: Since 1985, La Bella Tavola brings the authentic flavors of Italian culinary tradition to your table. Every dish tells a story of passion, selected ingredients and carefully handed-down recipes.
chiSiamo.valore1Desc: Every dish is prepared with love and dedication, following Italian traditions
chiSiamo.valore2Desc: We select the best products from local markets every day
chiSiamo.valore3Desc: Nearly 40 years of culinary history at the service of our guests
chiSiamo.valore4Desc: We respect original Italian recipes with a touch of creativity

cookie.tecniciDesc: Required for the website to function
cookie.analiticiDesc: Help us understand how you use the site
cookie.marketingDesc: Used to show you relevant content

policyPage.sec1Text: Cookies are small text files stored on the user's device when visiting a website. They allow the site to remember the user's actions and preferences for a determined period of time.
policyPage.sec2Intro: This website uses the following cookie categories, in compliance with European regulations and the guidelines of the Data Protection Authority:
policyPage.tecniciDesc: These cookies are essential for the proper functioning of the site and cannot be disabled. They do not collect personally identifiable information.
policyPage.analiticiDesc: These cookies collect anonymous information about how users use the site (pages visited, visit duration, traffic source). Data is collected in aggregate form and does not identify the user.
policyPage.marketingDesc: These cookies are used to provide personalized advertising content and to show relevant banners. They are activated only with the user's explicit consent.
policyPage.sec3Text: The user can manage cookie preferences in several ways:
policyPage.sec3Banner: Cookie banner: on first access to the site, the user can accept or reject non-essential cookies via the dedicated banner.
policyPage.sec3Browser: Browser settings: the user can configure their browser to block or delete cookies.
policyPage.sec4Text: Technical cookies are installed based on the legitimate interest of the Data Controller and do not require consent. Analytics and profiling cookies are installed only with the user's consent, under Article 6 of the GDPR and Article 122 of the Privacy Code.
policyPage.sec5Text: The Data Controller for data collected via cookies is
policyPage.sec5Contact: For any questions regarding this Cookie Policy, you can contact the Data Controller at the email address
policyPage.sec6Text: The Data Controller reserves the right to modify this Cookie Policy at any time. Changes will be published on this page.
policyPage.pSec1Text: The Data Controller for personal data is
policyPage.pSec2Text: The Data Controller has appointed a Data Protection Officer contactable at:
policyPage.pSec3Intro: This website collects the following types of personal data:
policyPage.pSec3Nav: Navigation data: IP address (anonymized), browser type, operating system, pages visited, access date and time, session duration. This data is collected in aggregate and anonymous form.
policyPage.pSec3Vol: Voluntarily provided data: name, surname, email address, phone number, reservation data. This data is provided exclusively by the user via the reservation form.
policyPage.pSec3Cookie: Technical and analytics cookies: as detailed in the
policyPage.pSec4Intro: Personal data is processed for the following purposes:
policyPage.pSec4Pren: Reservation management: receipt, confirmation and management of reservation requests submitted via the site.
policyPage.pSec4Stats: Anonymous statistical analysis: collection and analysis of aggregated and anonymous data to understand site usage.
policyPage.pSec4Law: Legal compliance: obligations required by applicable law.
policyPage.pSec5Text: The processing of personal data is based on the following legal bases, as provided by Article 6 of the GDPR:
policyPage.pSec6Text: Personal data will be retained for as long as necessary to achieve the purposes for which it was collected.
policyPage.pSec6Pren: Reservation data: retained for 12 months from the reservation date.
policyPage.pSec6Nav: Anonymized navigation data: retained for a maximum of 24 months.
policyPage.pSec6Analytics: Aggregated analytics data: retained for a maximum of 36 months.
policyPage.pSec7Text: Personal data is not sold to third parties for commercial purposes. Data may be shared with:
policyPage.pSec7Tech: Technical service providers (hosting, database) necessary for the operation of the site;
policyPage.pSec7Auth: Competent authorities, when required by law.
policyPage.pSec7List: The complete list of external data processors is available upon request to the Data Controller.
policyPage.pSec8Intro: Under Articles 15-22 of the GDPR, the data subject has the right to:
policyPage.pSec8Access: Access (Art. 15): obtain confirmation of processing and a copy of personal data;
policyPage.pSec8Rect: Rectification (Art. 16): obtain correction of inaccurate or incomplete data;
policyPage.pSec8Cancel: Erasure (Art. 17): obtain deletion of data no longer necessary;
policyPage.pSec8Port: Portability (Art. 20): receive data in a structured format and transfer it to another controller;
policyPage.pSec8Oppose: Objection (Art. 21): object to processing based on legitimate interest;
policyPage.pSec8Revoke: Withdrawal of consent (Art. 7, par. 3): withdraw consent at any time.
policyPage.pSec8Contact: To exercise your rights, you can contact the Data Controller at the email address
policyPage.pSec9Text: The data subject has the right to lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority:
policyPage.pSec10Text: The Data Controller reserves the right to make changes to this policy, which will be published on this page with the date of the last update.
